text: Ok. I've uploaded the exported virtualbox appliance in the case it helps in something: http://www.minasambiente.com.br/repo1/FreeBSDT2.ova (MD5 482f2e5489aa949af904cf49fa6ae9f9). Also, tell me what more I can do with this VM to help (if anything). Thanks!
